title: DarkFoe Live!!
description: UwU The Fabric version of the wessah-known ArgFoe-Live!! cwient-side modpack that bwings aww the comfy QoL featuwes you couwd evew ask fow, desu~
body:
UwU~ Step into the most based Minecraft Modpack ever, DarkFoe Live!!, nyaaa~!
This adorable bundle of chaos is bursting with sparkly treasures, magical dungeons, epic boss fights, and the fluffiest adventures imaginable! Build your dream kawaii cottage, team up with friends for super-duper fun, or tech your way to greatness in the most based and sugoi world around. It's the purr-fect mix of cute and chaos, nya~!
